canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>ferrum</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { 
  background: #0a0a0f; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  cursor: crosshair;
}
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H;
function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// Magnetic poles - click to place, alternate polarity
const poles = [];
let nextPolarity = 1;

// Iron filing particles
const particles = [];
const PARTICLE_COUNT = 4000;

class Particle {
  constructor() {
    this.x = Math.random() * W;
    this.y = Math.random() * H;
    this.angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
    this.length = 3 + Math.random() * 4;
    this.vx = 0;
    this.vy = 0;
    this.va = 0; // angular velocity
  }

  update() {
    if (poles.length === 0) {
      // Gentle brownian motion when no poles
      this.angle += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.05;
      return;
    }

    // Calculate net magnetic field at this point
    let bx = 0, by = 0;
    
    for (const pole of poles) {
      const dx = this.x - pole.x;
      const dy = this.y - pole.y;
      const distSq = dx * dx + dy * dy;
      const dist = Math.sqrt(distSq) + 1;
      
      // Field strength falls off with distance squared
      const strength = (pole.polarity * pole.strength) / (distSq + 500);
      
      // Field points away from positive, toward negative
      bx += (dx / dist) * strength;
      by += (dy / dist) * strength;
    }

    // Calculate target angle from field direction
    const fieldStrength = Math.sqrt(bx * bx + by * by);
    
    if (fieldStrength > 0.0001) {
      const targetAngle = Math.atan2(by, bx);
      
      // Smoothly rotate toward field direction
      let angleDiff = targetAngle - this.angle;
      while (angleDiff > Math.PI) angleDiff -= Math.PI * 2;
      while (angleDiff < -Math.PI) angleDiff += Math.PI * 2;
      
      // Filings can align either direction (180° symmetry)
      if (Math.abs(angleDiff) > Math.PI / 2) {
        angleDiff = angleDiff > 0 ? angleDiff - Math.PI : angleDiff + Math.PI;
      }
      
      this.va += angleDiff * 0.15 * Math.min(fieldStrength * 50, 1);
      this.va *= 0.85; // damping
      this.angle += this.va;
      
      // Slight drift along field lines
      const drift = fieldStrength * 0.3;
      this.vx += bx * drift * 0.1;
      this.vy += by * drift * 0.1;
    }
    
    // Apply velocity with damping
    this.vx *= 0.95;
    this.vy *= 0.95;
    this.x += this.vx;
    this.y += this.vy;
    
    // Wrap around edges
    if (this.x < 0) this.x += W;
    if (this.x > W) this.x -= W;
    if (this.y < 0) this.y += H;
    if (this.y > H) this.y -= H;
  }

  draw() {
    const cos = Math.cos(this.angle);
    const sin = Math.sin(this.angle);
    const x1 = this.x - cos * this.length;
    const y1 = this.y - sin * this.length;
    const x2 = this.x + cos * this.length;
    const y2 = this.y + sin * this.length;
    
    // Color based on local field strength
    let fieldStrength = 0;
    for (const pole of poles) {
      const dx = this.x - pole.x;
      const dy = this.y - pole.y;
      const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) + 1;
      fieldStrength += pole.strength / (dist * 0.5);
    }
    
    const intensity = Math.min(fieldStrength * 0.02, 1);
    const alpha = 0.3 + intensity * 0.5;
    
    // Gradient from cyan to pink based on field alignment
    const r = Math.floor(100 + intensity * 155);
    const g = Math.floor(180 - intensity * 80);
    const b = Math.floor(220 - intensity * 20);
    
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${alpha})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1 + intensity * 0.5;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
    ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
}

// Initialize particles
for (let i = 0; i < PARTICLE_COUNT; i++) {
  particles.push(new Particle());
}

// Draw magnetic field lines (for visual effect)
function drawFieldLines() {
  if (poles.length < 1) return;
  
  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.1;
  
  for (const pole of poles) {
    const numLines = 16;
    
    for (let i = 0; i < numLines; i++) {
      const startAngle = (i / numLines) * Math.PI * 2;
      let x = pole.x + Math.cos(startAngle) * 10;
      let y = pole.y + Math.sin(startAngle) * 10;
      
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(x, y);
      
      const direction = pole.polarity;
      
      for (let step = 0; step < 200; step++) {
        let bx = 0, by = 0;
        
        for (const p of poles) {
          const dx = x - p.x;
          const dy = y - p.y;
          const distSq = dx * dx + dy * dy;
          const dist = Math.sqrt(distSq) + 1;
          const strength = p.polarity / (distSq + 100);
          bx += (dx / dist) * strength;
          by += (dy / dist) * strength;
        }
        
        const mag = Math.sqrt(bx * bx + by * by);
        if (mag < 0.00001) break;
        
        x += (bx / mag) * 5 * direction;
        y += (by / mag) * 5 * direction;
        
        if (x < 0 || x > W || y < 0 || y > H) break;
        
        // Check if reached another pole
        let reachedPole = false;
        for (const p of poles) {
          const dx = x - p.x;
          const dy = y - p.y;
          if (dx * dx + dy * dy < 400) {
            reachedPole = true;
            break;
          }
        }
        if (reachedPole) break;
        
        ctx.lineTo(x, y);
      }
      
      const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(pole.x, pole.y, x, y);
      gradient.addColorStop(0, pole.polarity > 0 ? 'rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.3)' : 'rgba(100, 220, 255, 0.3)');
      gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(100, 100, 150, 0.1)');
      ctx.strokeStyle = gradient;
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      ctx.stroke();
    }
  }
  
  ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
}

// Draw poles
function drawPoles() {
  for (const pole of poles) {
    // Glow
    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(pole.x, pole.y, 0, pole.x, pole.y, 60);
    const color = pole.polarity > 0 ? 'rgba(255, 100, 200,' : 'rgba(100, 220, 255,';
    gradient.addColorStop(0, color + '0.4)');
    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, color + '0.1)');
    gradient.addColorStop(1, color + '0)');
    
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(pole.x, pole.y, 60, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Core
    ctx.fillStyle = pole.polarity > 0 ? '#ff64c8' : '#64dcff';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(pole.x, pole.y, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Symbol
    ctx.fillStyle = '#0a0a0f';
    ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
    ctx.fillText(pole.polarity > 0 ? '+' : '−', pole.x, pole.y);
  }
}

// Web Audio for magnetic hum
let audioCtx = null;
let oscillators = [];
let gainNode = null;

function initAudio() {
  if (audioCtx) return;
  
  audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
  gainNode.gain.value = 0;
  gainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  
  // Create layered drone
  const freqs = [55, 82.5, 110, 165];
  freqs.forEach((freq, i) => {
    const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const oscGain = audioCtx.createGain();
    osc.type = i % 2 === 0 ? 'sine' : 'triangle';
    osc.frequency.value = freq;
    oscGain.gain.value = 0.15 / (i + 1);
    osc.connect(oscGain);
    oscGain.connect(gainNode);
    osc.start();
    oscillators.push({ osc, gain: oscGain });
  });
}

function updateAudio() {
  if (!audioCtx || poles.length === 0) {
    if (gainNode) gainNode.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.1);
    return;
  }
  
  // Calculate total field energy
  let energy = 0;
  for (const pole of poles) {
    energy += pole.strength;
  }
  
  const targetGain = Math.min(energy * 0.001, 0.15);
  gainNode.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(targetGain, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.1);
  
  // Modulate frequencies based on pole count
  oscillators.forEach((o, i) => {
    const baseFreq = [55, 82.5, 110, 165][i];
    const mod = 1 + poles.length * 0.02;
    o.osc.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(baseFreq * mod, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.1);
  });
}

// Click to place poles
canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  initAudio();
  
  // Check if clicking on existing pole (remove it)
  for (let i = poles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const dx = e.clientX - poles[i].x;
    const dy = e.clientY - poles[i].y;
    if (dx * dx + dy * dy < 400) {
      poles.splice(i, 1);
      return;
    }
  }
  
  // Add new pole
  poles.push({
    x: e.clientX,
    y: e.clientY,
    polarity: nextPolarity,
    strength: 100
  });
  
  nextPolarity *= -1; // Alternate polarity
  
  // Limit poles
  if (poles.length > 8) {
    poles.shift();
  }
});

// Mouse movement affects nearby particles
let mouseX = W / 2, mouseY = H / 2;
canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  mouseY = e.clientY;
});

// Animation loop
function animate() {
  // Fade trail
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.15)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Draw field lines
  drawFieldLines();
  
  // Update and draw particles
  for (const p of particles) {
    // Mouse repulsion
    const dx = p.x - mouseX;
    const dy = p.y - mouseY;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    if (dist < 100) {
      const force = (100 - dist) * 0.002;
      p.vx += (dx / dist) * force;
      p.vy += (dy / dist) * force;
    }
    
    p.update();
    p.draw();
  }
  
  // Draw poles
  drawPoles();
  
  // Update audio
  updateAudio();
  
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

// Start with two default poles
poles.push({ x: W * 0.35, y: H * 0.5, polarity: 1, strength: 100 });
poles.push({ x: W * 0.65, y: H * 0.5, polarity: -1, strength: 100 });

animate();
</script>
</body>
</html>
